title: The Human Condition III: A Soldier's Prayer
originalTitle: 人間の條件　完結篇
posterAlt: The Human Condition III: A Soldier's Prayer (1961) movie poster
tmdbOverview: After the Japanese defeat to the Russians, Kaji leads the last remaining men through Manchuria. Intent on returning to his old life, he faces great odds in a variety of different harrowing circumstances as he and his men sneak behind enemy lines.
synopsis: The Human Condition III: A Soldier's Prayer is a 1961 war, drama and history film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.8 on IMDb. A standout of 1960s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. An official age rating was not available at the time of writing.
